title: Ian 小黑插图 Skill 说明视频
subject: ian-xiaohei-illustrations Codex skill

style.visual_identity: pure white canvas, black hand-drawn lines, Xiaohei as the core actor, sparse red/orange/blue annotations

story_arc: Ask what needs to be seen

shots.purpose: Hook the viewer by reframing illustration as cognitive judgment.
shots.voice_text: 一篇中文文章，真正难的不是配图，是找出哪个认知点值得被画出来。
shots.subtitle: 不是找图，是找认知锚点
shots.camera: static 16:9 whiteboard frame, left-weighted text, right sketch action
shots.composition: Xiaohei pulls one ink thread out of a question cloud; ink dust settles beside the anchor label.

vfx_contract.material: black ink dust with a few blue dots
vfx_contract.motion_path: spiral outward, follow the pulled thread, settle near the anchor label

shots.purpose: Show the failure mode of generic illustration.
shots.voice_text: 只把段落排成节点，结果很快就变成流程图、课件和装饰图。
shots.subtitle: 坏配图长得像 PPT
shots.camera: push transition into a denser right-side grid
shots.composition: Xiaohei carries too many labels into a formal grid; red correction mark rejects the grid.

vfx_contract.material: red crayon line and paper scraps
vfx_contract.motion_path: drop downward, bend labels, scatter scraps sideways

shots.purpose: Explain that the director layer decides purpose before visuals.
shots.voice_text: 所以它先做导演判断：hook、pain、proof、solution，每一张图都要服务一个目的。
shots.subtitle: Director 先判断目的
shots.camera: horizontal push, then close visual attention on a hand-drawn scale
shots.composition: Xiaohei adjusts an anchor scale while blue system notes stick to structure words.

vfx_contract.material: blue system notes, thin lines, small ink dots
vfx_contract.motion_path: arc outward to four structure labels
vfx_contract.endpoint: notes stick beside hook, pain, proof, solution

shots.purpose: Make the skill workflow concrete and memorable.
shots.voice_text: 然后才进入小黑风格：正文进来，锚点留下，隐喻成形，最后变成一张清爽的 16:9 正文配图。
shots.subtitle: 正文 -> 锚点 -> 隐喻 -> 配图
shots.camera: vertical push into a low-tech machine diagram
shots.composition: A crank machine turns text into anchor, metaphor, and final clean 16:9 output.

vfx_contract.motion_path: move through three tubes, narrow at filter, end on output sheet
vfx_contract.endpoint: orange arrow on the final page

shots.purpose: Give the viewer the QA checklist that keeps the style honest.
shots.voice_text: 复核时只看三件事：小黑是不是在干活，画面是不是够空，中文是不是够短。
shots.subtitle: QA：少、准、怪
shots.camera: squeeze transition that compresses clutter into three questions
shots.composition: Xiaohei erases crowded nodes, leaving three short QA prompts.

vfx_contract.material: red paper scraps and gray pencil dust
vfx_contract.motion_path: burst along eraser path, drift upward, dust sinks
vfx_contract.endpoint: clean white page with three QA prompts

shots.purpose: Close with a memorable operating principle.
shots.voice_text: 下一次不要先问配几张图。先问：哪个点需要被看见？
shots.subtitle: 哪个点需要被看见？
shots.camera: gentle push, final fade to white
shots.composition: Xiaohei opens a simple door; behind it is one clean hand-drawn article illustration.

vfx_contract.material: thin orange line and black ink dots
vfx_contract.motion_path: trace door edge, settle below final question
vfx_contract.endpoint: small anchor dot near Xiaohei's feet
